channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: JetBlue Offers Double Mosaic Tiles on $100+ One-Way Flights for Limited Time
item.description: JetBlue is offering a limited-time promotion allowing travelers to earn double Tiles toward Mosaic elite status for qualifying one-way flights costing $100 or more. This promotion is valid for booking...

item.title: Jada Pinkett Smith Files Motion to Dismiss Bilaal Salaam’s $3 Million Lawsuit Alleging Threats
item.description: Jada Pinkett Smith has moved to dismiss a $3 million lawsuit filed against her by musician Bilaal Salaam, rejecting his allegations as false and unsubstantiated. According to court documents cited in ...

item.title: EU Implements Rules to Prevent Destruction of Unsold Apparel and Footwear
item.description: The European Commission has introduced new measures under the Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation (ESPR) aimed at preventing the destruction of unsold clothing, footwear, and accessories. Ea...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Jokes About Affair Rumors Involving Corey Lewandowski and Kristi Noem
item.description: Late-night host Stephen Colbert devoted part of his Monday monologue to renewed rumors alleging a romantic relationship between Corey Lewandowski and Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem. Speculati...

item.title: Haier’s Ownership Model and the Diversity of Corporate Structures in China
item.description: The article examines the global scale and ownership structure of Haier, the Chinese home appliance giant, using it as a starting point to reflect on broader corporate models in China. It challenges th...

item.title: JetBlue Flight + Cruise Packages Offer BOGO Airfare and Bonus Points
item.description: JetBlue is running a promotional offer for travelers booking Flight + Cruise packages through TrueBlue Vacations. The promotion includes a Buy One, Get One Free (BOGO) deal on base airfare for two pas...

item.title: Swiss Olympic commentator criticises Israeli athlete’s past Gaza war comments during Winter Games broadcast
item.description: Coverage of the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics sparked controversy after a commentator on Swiss public broadcaster RTS criticised an Israeli athlete’s past social media statements about the war i...

item.title: Honest Review of Kimpton RiverPlace Hotel in Portland
item.description: Tim Steinke shares his experience staying at the Kimpton RiverPlace in Portland, Oregon, using Fine Hotels + Resorts (FHR) credits from his American Express Platinum® cards. While the hotel's location...

item.title: Songwriters Hall of Fame Inductee Billy Steinberg Dies at 74 After Cancer Battle
item.description: Billy Steinberg, the acclaimed American songwriter whose lyrics helped define pop music in the 1980s and 1990s, has died at the age of 74. According to his attorney, Laurie Soriano, Steinberg passed a...

item.title: Wall Street Journal Report Details Alleged Mismanagement and Conflicts of Interest at DHS Under Kristi Noem
item.description: A recent Wall Street Journal report has raised serious concerns about alleged corruption and mismanagement within the US Department of Homeland Security (DHS) under Secretary Kristi Noem. The report h...

item.title: The Role of the UK in Supporting the 1954 US-Backed Coup in Guatemala
item.description: Declassified documents reveal that in 1954, the United Kingdom played a key role in concealing the United States’ involvement in the overthrow of Guatemala’s democratically-elected government. Followi...

item.title: How Dashboard Cameras Provide Safety, Evidence, and Convenience for Families
item.description: The article explores the growing reasons families are installing dashboard cameras in their vehicles for everyday use. It explains that modern driving often involves unpredictable situations, from sud...

item.title: Hideki Sato, Key Engineer Behind Sega Consoles, Dies at 77
item.description: Hideki Sato, widely recognized as the 'Father of Sega Hardware,' passed away on February 13, 2026, at the age of 77. Joining Sega in 1971, Sato witnessed the company’s transformation from a U.S.-based...

item.title: Oscar-Winning Actor Robert Duvall Dies at 95 After Celebrated Six-Decade Career
item.description: Robert Duvall, the acclaimed and versatile American actor known for his powerful, understated performances across film and television, has died at the age of 95. His wife, Luciana, announced that he p...

item.title: Comprehensive Guide to the ALL Accor Loyalty Program
item.description: The ALL Accor loyalty program is often overlooked by U.S.-based travelers due to its limited presence in the United States and lack of a co-branded credit card. Despite this, it offers strong value fo...

item.title: Estonian Intelligence Report Highlights Surge in Russia’s Ammunition Production and Imports
item.description: According to the latest report published by Estonian intelligence services (VLA), Russia’s military-industrial complex operated at full capacity over the past year, producing more than seven million u...

item.title: How Visa Infinite Cardholders Can Claim Free Regal Movie Tickets and Popcorn
item.description: Visa Infinite cardholders can take advantage of a promotional offer through the Visa Infinite Concierge service to receive two free Regal movie tickets and popcorn. To qualify, cardholders must regist...

item.title: Comprehensive Review of the Chase Ink Business Cash Credit Card
item.description: The Chase Ink Business Cash Credit Card is a no-annual-fee business card that stands out for its high-value rewards and versatility. It offers 5X Chase Ultimate Rewards points on spending at cell phon...

item.title: Czech Designer Reimagines City Logos in Retro 1980s Style
item.description: Czech designer Kostya Petrenko has created a series of city logos inspired by the distinctive aesthetic of the 1980s. The project applies the era's characteristic slightly pixelated, analog glow to we...

item.title: Capital One Shopping Offers High Cash Back Rates on Travel and Retail Purchases
item.description: Capital One Shopping, a public shopping portal that does not require a Capital One card, has recently rolled out a series of elevated cash back offers. Users have reported receiving targeted email pro...
